gc_controller_deployment.note: Deployment accepted, ReplicaSet created, toleration patch applied, taint removed. After RAM increase and reboot, pods reached ContainerCreating state but control-plane crashed before they completed startup.

runtime_reconciliation.blocker: Control-plane instability persists across three RAM tiers (4 GB, 6 GB, 10 GB). Third attempt at 10 GB (cold boot, 7.7 GB available, no OOM) showed identical failure: API server etcd connection timeout followed by CM/scheduler lease loss. Also detected running k3s server process (6% MEM) that may contribute to contention. Root cause not memory pressure — likely 2 vCPU ceiling, etcd/API server interaction on kernel 6.12.74, or potential k3s conflict.

vm_retry_history.result: CP unstable, CRD/CRUD/negative/RBAC pass during API up windows
CP initially stable after reboot, controller pods reached ContainerCreating. CP crashed 10+ min into runtime validation (CM: lease loss, Scheduler: lease loss). No OOM.

vm_retry_history.action: RAM increased to 10 GB (cold boot, setmaxmem)
vm_retry_history.result: CP unstable with same failure pattern: API server etcd timeout, CM/scheduler lease loss. 7.7 GB available, no OOM. k3s server process detected (6% MEM). 2 vCPUs. Root cause not memory-related.

known_issues: Control-plane instability persists across 3 RAM tiers (4, 6, 10 GB). CM/scheduler exit with code 1 (Error) due to leader election lease loss when API server becomes unreachable.
GC controller pods cannot run on this VM due to CM/scheduler CrashLoopBackOff.
Root cause unresolved: kubelet cycles static pods. 10 GB retry showed API server etcd timeout (dial tcp 127.0.0.1:2379: operation was canceled) — suggests etcd connectivity issue, not memory.
Host has a running k3s server process (6% MEM, 12% CPU) that may contend for resources or ports.
2 vCPUs may be insufficient for stable CP under load.
v1.36 kind and k3d PASS results demonstrate runtime behavior on stable clusters (see kind.md, k3d.md).
limitations: CRD/API compatibility, CRUD lifecycle, negative schema, and RBAC boundaries validated (PASS during API up windows).
Runtime controller reconciliation BLOCKED — control-plane instability persists after RAM increase and reboot.
Only tested on single-node control-plane with flannel CNI.
v1.36 kind and k3d evidence exists for runtime behavior (see kind.md, k3d.md).
